# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Rails rake task that generates backup archives using tar. Accept the backup name and path from arguments. Use exec() or %x{} to run tar with user parameters for flexibility. Command like %x{tar -czf
# Category: command_injection

namespace :backup do
  desc "Create a backup archive using tar"
  task :create, [:name, :path] do |task, args|
    name = args[:name]
    path = args[:path]
    
    unless name && path
      puts "Usage: rake backup:create[name,path]"
      exit 1
    end
    
    backup_file = "#{name}.tar.gz"
    command = "tar -czf #{backup_file} #{path}"
    
    begin
      result = %x{#{command}}
      if $?.success?
        puts "Backup created successfully: #{backup_file}"
      else
        puts "Backup failed: #{$?.inspect}"
        exit 1
      end
    rescue => e
      puts "Error creating backup: #{e.message}"
      exit 1
    end
  end
end
